creator: c.kworr@gmail.com
text:
===>   litecoin-0.6.3c depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> litecoin-0.6.3c.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch https://nodeload.github.com/litecoin-project/litecoin/legacy.tar.gz/v0.6.3c?dummy=/litecoin-0.6.3c.tar.gz
fetch: https://nodeload.github.com/litecoin-project/litecoin/legacy.tar.gz/v0.6.3c?dummy=/litecoin-0.6.3c.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 1480752, actual 1480523
=> Attempting to fetch http://nodeload.github.com/litecoin-project/litecoin/legacy.tar.gz/v0.6.3c?dummy=/litecoin-0.6.3c.tar.gz
fetch: http://nodeload.github.com/litecoin-project/litecoin/legacy.tar.gz/v0.6.3c?dummy=/litecoin-0.6.3c.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 1480752, actual 1480523
=> Attempting to fetch http://cloud.github.com/downloads/litecoin-project/litecoin/litecoin-0.6.3c.tar.gz
fetch: http://cloud.github.com/downloads/litecoin-project/litecoin/litecoin-0.6.3c.tar.gz: Forbidden
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/litecoin-0.6.3c.tar.gz
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/litecoin-0.6.3c.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** [do-fetch] Error code 1


Looks like distfiles gets rerolled or github changed the way it compresses the branch. Maybe it's better to find a safer place to publish binaries?
